name: SOL Delayed Retest Continuation v1
thesis: When SOL 4h breaks into a stronger state, the better continuation trade may be the delayed retest rather than the immediate trigger. The edge should come from entering only after breakout structure survives retest and resumes, reducing false-break exposure.
edge_mechanism: breakout continuation after delayed retest confirmation
invalidation_condition: If delayed retest continuation remains too sparse or unprofitable after costs, then SOL 4h breakout follow-through is not worth prioritizing in this regime.

long: Scaled-out exits: 35% at 1.0 * ATR_14, 35% at 1.8 * ATR_14
Scale in additional 25% if Close closes 0.8 * ATR_14 beyond entry in favor
Trail remaining position with 1.2 * ATR_14 chandelier stop
short: Scaled-out exits: 35% at 1.0 * ATR_14, 35% at 1.8 * ATR_14
Scale in additional 25% if Close closes 0.8 * ATR_14 beyond entry in favor
Trail remaining position with 1.2 * ATR_14 chandelier stop

regime_filter.detection_method: Require breakout close, then a retest toward EMA_20 and renewed close in direction of the break.
